summary: Full testing of P&D Agency landing page - backend API and frontend UI. All 6 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified: page loads correctly with dark brutalist design, all CTA buttons open contact modal, package pre-selection works, form submission succeeds with success message.

issues: body element background-color is white; dark background (#0e0e0e) is only on the root div - not a visual issue but technically incorrect for full page background (e.g. if content is short or scrolled beyond content)

action_items: Minor: Add `body { background-color: #0e0e0e; }` to index.css to ensure body background matches app
critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent missing aria-describedby - only a console warning, not a functional issue
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed contact submissions created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Backend POST /api/contact and GET /api/contact both functional. All 5 CTA buttons open contact modal. Package pre-selection verified (Pacote Projeto). Form submission shows success message. No auth required.
